economic_notes: Band operates a dispensary retail store on a cash basis. Economic development includes renting band-owned equipment, lease income, and other projects. Committed $585,750 to Robinson Huron Treaty Trust legal action.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED due to dispensary retail store revenues conducted on a cash basis — completeness of revenues not susceptible to satisfactory audit verification for both 2021 and 2020. Consolidated entities: TFN Economic Development Corporation, Elite Bio-Centre Productions Inc., Goganonganga Limited Partnership. Landfill closure liability of $1,238,411 recorded. $300,000 revolving credit facility available but undrawn. Contingent liability for CMHC housing renovation loans, land claim negotiations ($152,060 advanced), disputed municipal taxes of ~$1,137,000, and Robinson Huron Treaty Trust commitment of $585,750.
